---
title: "FreezingSaddles"
description: "Analytics and visualization for a winter cycling challenge tracking mileage, leaderboards, and participation across teams."
date: "2025-05-01"
categories: [cycling, analytics, visualization, python]
image: ../images/freezingsaddles.jpg
---

## Overview

FreezingSaddles is a winter cycling challenge that encourages riders to log miles 
during the coldest months of the year. This project covers the data pipeline, 
leaderboard analytics, and visualizations built to support the challenge.

## Features

- Automated mileage ingestion from Strava and manual entries
- Team and individual leaderboards
- Interactive visualizations of ride data
- Historical trend analysis across challenge years

## Technical Stack

- **Backend:** Python (Flask, pandas)
- **Data:** Strava API, CSV ingestion
- **Visualization:** Plotly, Matplotlib
- **Deployment:** Docker, GitHub Actions

## Highlights

- Processed thousands of ride entries across multiple seasons
- Built interactive leaderboard dashboards
- Automated data pipeline reducing manual entry overhead

## Links

- [GitHub Repository](https://github.com/velezf/freezingsaddles)
- [Live Site](https://velezf.github.io/freezingsaddles) *(if applicable)*

## Status

✅ *Active — updated each winter cycling season.*
